name: Will you let her in? ❄
description:
❄ A strong snowstorm is about to hit, but luckily for you, you rented a cozy and warm cabin to spend a few days in the mountains. The thing is, there's a girl at your door literally begging for shelter. Will you let her in? She seems to be freezing...

The reason you rented a cabin in such a snowy location is up to you.

Rambling
This pic was my first one I’ve used here on Janitor that was generated on CivitAI instead of Tensor, and my days have been pretty hectic because of college. That said, I don't have extra pictures this time, and the bot only has an initial message. Still, check it out, as it's definitely worth it!
Of course, I must emphasize that DeepSeek always works better than the LLM.


Suggest other initial messages that you'd like to see!
